description: 97 - 26-02-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Jonathan Powell (National Security Adviser. No.10)

participants.name: Emails between Peter Mandelson and Jonathan Powell

text:
No.10)

Subject: Re: VVIP Visit - Update post NSC engagement OS LIMDIS
Date: Wednesday, 26 February 2025 at 12:47:20 Greenwich Mean Time
From: Jonathan Powell

To: Peter Mandelson
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
eK
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Peter Mandelson < Personal >

Sent: Wednesday, February 26, 2025 12:07:22 PM
To: Jonathan Powell < Personal >
Subject: Fw: VVIP Visit - Update post NSC engagement OS LIMDIS

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

RK

Get Outlook for iOS

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Ailsa Terry < Personal S
Sent: Wednesday, February 26, 2025 4:01:09 AM

To: Jonathan Powell < Personal a5 JES Pd
Cc: Peter Mandelson < Personal >; James Roscoe Personal >
Joseph Fisher< Personal >; Jessica Philips < Personal >; JCS

JCS ; Matthew Doyle < Personal >; David Pares

< Personal >
Subject: Re: VVIP Visit - Update post NSC engagement OS LIMDIS

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Hi
Copying Matthew and Dave tba of latest.

Ailsa

290

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Jonathan Powell <
>
Sent: Wednesday, 26 February 2025 07:54:26
To: 
; Ailsa Terry <
>
Cc: Peter Mandelson <
>; James Roscoe <
>;
Joseph Fisher <
>; Jessica Philips <
>; 
Subject: Re: VVIP Visit - Update post NSC engagement OS LIMDIS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Thanks. 
 The problem is that if BIOT is not solved
 before the meeting we will certainly be asked about it by British journalists at the press
conference afterwards, and we don’t want to be banjaxed there. So if it is not sorted before
the meeting it will have to come up there in one form or another. 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
JCS
JCS
JCS
***

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
